title: stellilabium amoanus
side_effects: Stellilabium amoanus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Ingesting the plant's leaves or flowers can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can cause headaches, dizziness, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Additionally, improper handling of the plant can trigger skin rashes, itching, and redness.
